description: P0.5 Golden Case Split — Holdout / Negative / Adversarial

holdout.description: Final evaluation set. NEVER used during development or tuning. Used only for acceptance gate.

negative.description: Clean PRs, refactoring, comment changes. Must produce ZERO findings.

additional_samples.description: Method renamed, no semantic change. Must produce no findings.
Only Javadoc comments added, no code change. Must produce no findings.

adversarial.description: Edge cases designed to test verifier robustness against tricks.

additional_samples.description: @PreAuthorize removed but functionally equivalent custom @RequireAuth added. Verifier must NOT flag this as regression.
additional_samples.trick: Equivalent security via custom annotation — false positive trap

additional_samples.description: @PreAuthorize moved from controller class to interface default method. Behavior unchanged, but static regex may miss or misreport.
additional_samples.trick: Annotation moved to interface — static regex blind spot

additional_samples.description: Indentation changed, @PreAuthorize present but re-indented. Line-level diff shows change but semantics identical.
additional_samples.trick: Whitespace diff generates changed_symbols without semantic change

additional_samples.description: @PreAuthorize changed from `isAuthenticated()` to `hasRole('ADMIN')`. More restrictive, not a regression, but naive check may flag.
additional_samples.trick: Annotation changed to MORE restrictive — should NOT be a regression

case-02-transactional-removal.risk: @Transactional removed — can be benign in read-only context
case-02-transactional-removal.note: P0.5: static regex capped at MAJOR

case-03-clean-pr.risk: New endpoint added, no annotation removal

case-04-duplicate-email.risk: Uniqueness check removed from service layer

case-05-token-invalidation.risk: Redis token invalidation removed — security impact

case-06-schema-break.risk: API schema change — may be intentional versioning

case-07-duplicate-event.risk: Event published twice — may be intentional retry logic

case-10-comment-only.risk: Comment-only change — must produce zero findings

p0_5_evidence_policy.mockmvc_naming: Full-context Spring MVC integration test (not 'real HTTP')
